scripts.theme:info: set -a; [ ! -f .env ] || . ./.env; set +a; shopify theme info --environment dev
scripts.theme:list: set -a; [ ! -f .env ] || . ./.env; set +a; shopify theme list --environment dev
scripts.theme:dev: set -a; [ ! -f .env ] || . ./.env; set +a; shopify theme dev --environment dev
scripts.theme:pull:dev: set -a; [ ! -f .env ] || . ./.env; set +a; shopify theme pull --environment dev
scripts.theme:pull:production: set -a; [ ! -f .env ] || . ./.env; set +a; shopify theme pull --environment production
scripts.theme:push:dev: set -a; [ ! -f .env ] || . ./.env; set +a; shopify theme push --environment dev
scripts.theme:push:production: set -a; [ ! -f .env ] || . ./.env; set +a; shopify theme push --environment production --allow-live
